title: Maalai Neram Lyrics Aayiraththil Oruvan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Maalai neram
mazhai thoorum kaalam
En jannal oram nirkkiren

Neeyum naanum oru porvaikkulle
Siru megam pole mithakkiren
Odum kaalangal udan odum nianaivugal
Vazhi maarum payanangal thodargirathey

Idhu thaan vaazhkaiyaa
Oru thunai thaan thevaiya
Manam yeno ennaye ketkirathey

Oho Kaadhal inge uyarnthathu
Kavithai ondru mudinthathu
Thedum podhey tholainthadhey anbey

Idhu sogam aanaal oru sugam
Nenjin ulle paravidum
Naam pazhgiya kaalam paravasam anbe
idham tharumey

Un karam korkayil
Ninaivu oraayiram
Pin iru karam pirigayil
Ninaivu nooraayiram

Kaadhalil vizhuntha idhayam
Meetka mudiyaathathu
Kanavil tholaintha nijangal
Meendum kidaikkaathathu

Oru kaalayil nee illai
Thedavum manam vara villai
Pirinthathum purinthathu
Naan ennai izhanthen ena

Oho Kaadhal inge uyarnthathu
Kavithai ondru mudinthathu
Thedum podhey tholainthadhey anbey

Idhu sogam aanaal oru sugam
Nenjin ulle paravidum
Naam pazhgiya kaalam paravasam anbe

Oru murai vaasalil neeyaai vandhaal enna
Naan ketkave thudiththidum vaarthai sonnaal enna
Iru manam sergayil pizhaigal
Poruththu kondaal enna
Iru thisai paravaigal inaindhey vinnil sendraal enna

En thedalkal nee illai
Un kanavugal naan illai
Iru vizhi paarkaiyil
Naam urugi nindraal enna

Maalai neram
mazhai thoorum kaalam
En jannal oram nirkkiren

Neeyum naanum oru porvaikkulle
Siru megam pole mithakkiren
Odum kaalangal udan odum nianaivugal
Vazhi maarum payanangal thodargirathey

Idhu thaan vaazhkaiyaa
Oru thunai thaan thevaiya
Manam yeno ennaye ketkirathey

Oho Kaadhal inge uyarnthathu
Kavithai ondru mudinthathu
Thedum podhey tholainthadhey anbey

Idhu sogam aanaal oru sugam
Nenjin ulle paravidum
Naam pazhgiya kaalam paravasam anbe
idham tharumey
idham tharumey

seo.title: Maalai Neram Lyrics Aayiraththil Oruvan Song Lyrics
seo.description: Full Maalai Neram songs lyrics, Aayirathil Oruvan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Yuvan, Singer(s): Andrea Jeremiah, GV Prakash Kumar.
seo.keywords: Aayirathil Oruvan, Yuvan, Andrea Jeremiah, GV Prakash Kumar, Maalai Neram full lyrics, Aayirathil Oruvan songs lyrics, Maalai Neram lyrics snippets, Maalai Neram WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Maalai Neram lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Maalai Neram beautifully expresses themes of love and connection, evoking deep emotions through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Aayirathil Oruvan, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and GV Prakash Kumar.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Maalai Neram was composed by the renowned Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was this song released?

Maalai Neram was released on July 24, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Maalai Neram, the song encapsulates the tender emotions of love and longing, set against the backdrop of Aayirathil Oruvan. The lyrics convey a sense of nostalgia and connection, making it a perfect melody for romantic occasions. The soothing voices of Andrea Jeremiah and GV Prakash Kumar enhance the emotional depth of the song. Overall, it evokes feelings of warmth and affection, making it a cherished piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maalai Neram from Aayirathil Oruvan is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Andrea Jeremiah and GV Prakash Kumar, paired with Yuvan's mesmerizing composition, this song takes you on an emotional journey. Experience the magic of this romantic melody that resonates with every heartbeat.
stanzaMeanings: Evening time, the rain is pouring, I am standing by my window.
You and I are like a small cloud in a big sky, memories flow like rivers, and paths change with experiences.
Is this life? A companion is needed, my heart is asking me something.
Oh, love has risen here, a poem has come to an end, searching for what was lost, my dear.
This is sorrow, but also a comfort, it spreads within my heart, our past times give us joy, my dear.
In your hands, there are a thousand memories, in your other hand, there are a hundred memories.
In love, a fallen heart cannot be repaired, the truths lost in dreams cannot be regained.
In a moment, if you are not there, my heart cannot find peace, even if we are separated, I feel like I have lost myself.
Oh, love has risen here, a poem has come to an end, searching for what was lost, my dear.
This is sorrow, but also a comfort, it spreads within my heart, our past times give us joy, my dear.
Hey hey, this will give us joy, oh.
If you come to my door once, what will I say if I hear your words? If two hearts unite, what will happen if they have flaws? If two directions meet in the sky, what will happen?
Without you, my searches are in vain, my dreams are lost, if we melt in each other's gaze, what will happen?
Evening time, the rain is pouring, I am standing by my window.
You and I are like a small cloud in a big sky, memories flow like rivers, and paths change with experiences.
Is this life? A companion is needed, my heart is asking me something.
Oh, love has risen here, a poem has come to an end, searching for what was lost, my dear.
This is sorrow, but also a comfort, it spreads within my heart, our past times give us joy, my dear, this will give us joy, this will give us joy.
